ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "gameid_num" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "seasonid" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game takes place */,
  "gameid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game takes place */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the game is played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Starting time of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee officiating the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Actual attendance at the game */,
  "travel_distance" REAL /* Travel distance for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gameid_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_seasonid FOREIGN KEY ("seasonid") REFERENCES seasons ("seasonid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "seasonid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* The year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Starting date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Ending date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that won the championship */,
  "most_valuable_player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MVP of the season */,
  "attendance_record" INTEGER /* Highest attendance for any game in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonid")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation used for the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team participates */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "venue_website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's official website */,
  "nearest_public_transport" TEXT /* Nearest public transport options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "gameid_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the losing team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter (e.g., Q1: 20, Q2: 25, Q3: 30, Q4: 22) */,
  "player_of_the_game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_losing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_player_of_the_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_of_the_game_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_gameid_num FOREIGN KEY ("gameid_num") REFERENCES games ("gameid_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcasts" (
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcast */,
  "gameid_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being broadcasted */,
  "broadcast_network" TEXT /* Network broadcasting the game */,
  "broadcast_time" TEXT /* Time when the game is broadcasted */,
  "broadcast_region" TEXT /* Region where the broadcast is available */,
  "broadcast_language" TEXT /* Languages in which the game is broadcasted */,
  "broadcast_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcasts_gameid_num FOREIGN KEY ("gameid_num") REFERENCES games ("gameid_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "gameid_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  "remaining_tickets" INTEGER /* Remaining tickets for sale */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., general admission, VIP, season ticket) */,
  "ticket_sales_start_date" TEXT /* Date when ticket sales began */,
  "ticket_sales_end_date" TEXT /* Date when ticket sales ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_gameid_num FOREIGN KEY ("gameid_num") REFERENCES games ("gameid_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan engagement record */,
  "gameid_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions related to the game */,
  "fan_predictions" TEXT /* Fan predictions for the game outcome */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "fan_sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment of fans (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "fan_participation" TEXT /* Fan participation in activities like fantasy sports, polls, and contests */,
  "fan_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by fans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_gameid_num FOREIGN KEY ("gameid_num") REFERENCES games ("gameid_num")
)
